title: Panchari Bazar Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Panchari Bazar with a Z-Score of +4.34. The heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Panchari Bazar are extremely hot and dry, with a heat index exacerbated by high temperatures. 
The relative humidity is at 67%, and the wind speed is 12.0 km/h, offering little relief from the heat. 
The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 14.2 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling systems.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to protect the population.
